title: The ACTUAL First UFO Crash In The U.S.
summary: This interview discusses the Trinity UFO crash, which allegedly occurred in San Antonio, New Mexico in August 1945, just 20 days after the first atomic test and two days after Japan's surrender. The crash was reportedly witnessed by two young boys who described seeing a metallic avocado-shaped craft containing three humanoid creatures.

events.description: Trinity atomic test conducted in July in New Mexico
Alleged UFO crash in San Antonio, New Mexico, 20 days after Trinity test and two days after Japanese concession

key_claims.claim: A metallic avocado-shaped object crashed in San Antonio, New Mexico, 20 days after the first atomic test on U.S. soil
The crash occurred two days after the Japanese concession
Two children, Remy Baca (age 7) and Jose Padilla (age 9), witnessed the crashed craft
The witnesses observed three humanoid creatures inside the craft, approximately three feet tall with two eyes, two arms, three fingers, and two legs
The craft was damaged with one missing panel but maintained its integrity
